sn15.15:1.1: Near Sāvatthī. There the Blessed One said:
sn15.15:1.2: “From an inconceivable beginning comes the wandering-on. A beginning point is not discernible, though beings hindered by ignorance and fettered by craving are transmigrating & wandering on.
sn15.15:1.3: A being who has not been your father at one time in the past is not easy to find.…
